name: Black Banner Mercenaries
agenda: Secure profitable contracts and expand influence across the Acasian marches
keyNPCs: Captain Rusk — Former Ykrul hostage, pragmatic commander
The Black Colonel — Legendary commander, possibly dead
The Veteran Sergeant — Counts scars like coin
resources: Soldiers, siege equipment, camp followers, war horses
hooks: The Black Colonel's death is being covered up
description: The Bloody Fist are the largest and most feared mercenary company in Acasia. Their standards are black, their contracts are iron, and their loyalty ends at the next payday. They have served every kingdom and betrayed every kingdom—but they always collect their coin.
territory: Acasia, Vhasia, and the northern marches
